title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3-10-2017: 500 meter diameters around the world as background

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his March 10, 2017 day in Boulder: working on a lengthy Patreon introduction page (describing it as like writing a song), visiting his mom's house to return a vacuum and help organize, and dealing with multiple dead external hard drives that are threatening his data backups. He also mentions plans to sell his car by washing it, photographing it, and making a listing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: It's a major undertaking that will take a whole week, but exciting once done
It's super fun — hearing ideas come together is rewarding
Frustrated and regretful; plans to buy two more drives immediately
In debt ($3,000 credit card) and considering borrowing more money from his mom

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up early at seven today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked on my Patreon and introduction page for my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The introduction page is about seven point eight pages or eight minutes long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The introduction page is not done yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Completing the introduction page will take a whole week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to my mom's house to drop off her vacuum.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom and brother have already gone back into the shampoo.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might remain maybe startup, but I didn't have the motivation to do it again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I brought the vacuum back to my mom's house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I vacuumed my mom's house and helped her organize stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom wanted me to watch 'Madagascar' while unloading dairy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I edited my Patreon page directly because it makes me feel more comfortable.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not sure if the edits will look the same on the final page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked backwards on the edits, which felt like having a control seat.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hesitated to redo edits too many times.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I remember editing the same thing three times.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Now I copy and paste edits into a backup file to avoid freaking out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The goal is to include every idea I have in the introduction page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Writing the introduction page feels like writing a song.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I sent a copy of the introduction page to my mom and girlfriend to edit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom and girlfriend give me ideas based on their confusions.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I forgot to do backups for a few days because I got out of the habit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I use a Google Earth backdrop for my backups.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have two hard drives, one of which is broken.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My big external hard drive won't communicate anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My Toshiba hard drive also won't communicate anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Everything is now writing on the one remaining external hard drive.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I should have checked the broken hard drive last week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to buy two more hard drives.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll ask my mom for money to buy the hard drives.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have $3,000 in credit card debt, which is a lot for interest.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom has $100,000 because her brother stole her mother's house cash.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can borrow less money than the value of my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I washed the outside of my car today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow I'll clean the inside of my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll take photos of my car and put them on sale sites.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll make a commercial video for my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Selling the car is stressful but motivating.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's been a few years since I've written anything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Writing is super fun because you hear your ideas come to life.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When the introduction page is done, it's going to be cool.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I've talked long enough for Google to transcribe.
